description: Allows admin to create and manage programs with flexible, modular pricing including base fees, registration fees, coupons, and per-enrollment overrides.

screens.description: List of all programs with status, dates, and enrollment counts

features.description: Tabular or card view of all programs showing key details at a glance

requirements.description: Display program name, age group, date range, enrollment count vs capacity, and status (draft, active, closed)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All fields visible for each program; list is sortable by name, start date, and status

screens.description: Form to create or edit a program with all configuration fields

features.description: Set program name, age group, sessions, duration, location, dates

requirements.description: Admin can set: program name, age group, number of sessions, session duration, location, start date, end date
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All fields are required for publishing; draft programs can have incomplete fields

requirements.description: Program has status: draft, active, closed
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Only 'active' programs are visible to parents; admin can change status at any time

features.description: Configure base program fee, registration fee, and fee toggles

requirements.description: Admin can set a base program fee (total or per-session rate × number of sessions)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Fee can be entered as total amount or calculated from per-session rate; final amount displays correctly

requirements.description: Admin can set a registration fee and toggle it as required or waived at the program level
requirements.acceptance_criteria: When set to 'waived', registration fee is not included in enrollment price breakdown; when 'required', it is added

requirements.description: Admin can apply per-enrollment manual overrides: waive registration fee, give free sessions
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Override is applied to a specific enrollment and reflected in that enrollment's price breakdown without affecting the program-level pricing

features.description: Create, edit, and deactivate coupon codes

requirements.description: Admin can create coupons with: code, discount type (percentage or flat amount), applicable scope (program fee only, registration fee only, or both), optional expiry date, optional usage limit
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Coupon with all fields can be created, edited, and deactivated; deactivated coupons are not accepted during enrollment

requirements.description: Parent can enter a coupon code during enrollment and see the discount applied to the price breakdown in real time
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Valid coupon reduces the displayed total; invalid or expired coupon shows an error message; discount is applied to the correct fee component based on scope

business_rules.rule: Price breakdown must always show individual components: base fee, registration fee (or waived), coupon discount (if any), and total
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Every enrollment displays an itemized breakdown with each component labeled and the final total calculated correctly

business_rules.rule: Coupons cannot reduce the total below zero
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: If a coupon discount exceeds the applicable fee, the discount is capped at the fee amount and total shows $0 for that component

business_rules.rule: Per-enrollment overrides take precedence over program-level defaults
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: If admin waives registration for a specific enrollment, that enrollment shows $0 registration even if the program requires it

business_rules.rule: Only active programs are visible to parents on the enrollment page
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Draft and closed programs do not appear in parent-facing program listings
